parameters.query:
SELECT
    S.XSAL_0 AS code_x3,
    S.XNAMSAL_0 AS nom,
    S.XPRENOM_0 AS prenom,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), S.XDTN_0, 103) AS date_naissance,
    CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), S.XDTE_0, 103) AS date_entree,
    CASE
    WHEN (DATEDIFF(MONTH, S.XDTE_0, GETDATE())
          - CASE WHEN DAY(GETDATE()) < DAY(S.XDTE_0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 12 = 0
    THEN
        CAST(
            (DATEDIFF(MONTH, S.XDTE_0, GETDATE())
             - CASE WHEN DAY(GETDATE()) < DAY(S.XDTE_0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) % 12 AS VARCHAR
        ) + ' mois'

    ELSE
        CAST(
            (DATEDIFF(MONTH, S.XDTE_0, GETDATE())
             - CASE WHEN DAY(GETDATE()) < DAY(S.XDTE_0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 12 AS VARCHAR
        ) + ' ' +
        CASE
            WHEN (DATEDIFF(MONTH, S.XDTE_0, GETDATE())
                  - CASE WHEN DAY(GETDATE()) < DAY(S.XDTE_0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / 12 = 1
            THEN 'an'
            ELSE 'ans'
        END
        + ' et ' +
        CAST(
            (DATEDIFF(MONTH, S.XDTE_0, GETDATE())
             - CASE WHEN DAY(GETDATE()) < DAY(S.XDTE_0) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) % 12 AS VARCHAR
        ) + ' mois'
END AS anciennete_affichage,
    P.YTIT_0 AS Poste,
    S.XEMAIL_0 AS Email

FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL S
LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.ZPOSTE P
    ON S.ZPOSTE_0 = P.YNUM_0
WHERE
    S.XFLG_0 = 2
    AND MONTH(S.XDTN_0) = MONTH(GETDATE())
    AND DAY(S.XDTN_0) = DAY(GETDATE())
ORDER BY S.XNAMSAL_0, S.XPRENOM_0;

SELECT 
		    SALARIE.XSAL_0 AS "Code X3",
			SALARIE.XMAT_0 AS "Matricule",
			  SALARIE.XNAMSAL_0+' '+SALARIE.XPRENOM_0 AS "Nom & Prénom",
			  SALARIE.YSUP_0 AS "Code X3 Sup",
			SUP.XNAMSAL_0+' '+SUP.XPRENOM_0 AS "Supérieur",
			SUP.XFLG_0 AS "Supérieur FLAG"
FROM jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL SALARIE
			LEFT JOIN jbelrh.JBELRH.XSAL SUP ON SALARIE.YSUP_0=SUP.XSAL_0
WHERE SALARIE.XFLG_0=2 And SUP.XFLG_0<>2
